channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Pregnancy & Reproductive Health
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: Pregnancy & Reproductive Health

item.title: osr1 as a Novel Marker for ICC-Like Cells Development in Zebrafish.
item.description: Cell biology international - Interstitial cells of Cajal (ICCs) are essential for maintaining normal intestinal function, and their dysfunction is closely associated with various gastrointestinal diseases. However, the develop...

item.title: Repeated opioid use during pregnancy in women with inflammatory bowel disease: prevalence and impact on birth outcomes in Denmark.
item.description: Journal of Crohn's & colitis - In women with IBD, there are few options to treat pain during pregnancy and prescribers sometimes rely on opioids. We investigated the prevalence of repeated opioid use during the pregnancy period ...
